name: Portsmouth Athletics Track (Mountbatten Centre)
metaTitle: Mountbatten Leisure Centre | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the Mountbatten Centre in Portsmouth.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:00–22:00, Sat–Sun 07:00–20:00. Note the track is occasionally booked for exclusive club or event sessions.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: pay-as-you-go sessions for non-members, often around £3.50–£4.50, and full access through City of Portsmouth AC (COPAC) memberships, which range from roughly £85 to £110+ per year.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An 8-lane 400m synthetic track with complete track and field facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Ample free on-site parking is provided for all centre visitors at the Mountbatten Leisure Centre.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Alexandra Park, Twyford Avenue, Portsmouth, PO2 9QA

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official BH Live Active page for Mountbatten Leisure Centre for the latest track availability.
